> ⚠️ **Before implementing:** please read [`rule.md`](../../rule.md) first — it defines this project's
> architecture conventions (page.tsx/hooks/components split, API route per feature, README update),
> React/Hooks best practices, Supabase/DB rules, and the Git branching workflow. PRs that don't follow
> `rule.md` will be asked to be revised.
